parameters.content:
## Setup — Helga Create Identity
1. Rebuild/redeploy n8n image from infrastructure/n8n (faker + nostr-tools; NODE_PATH set).
2. Set env NODE_FUNCTION_ALLOW_EXTERNAL=@faker-js/faker,@faker-js/faker/locale/de,nostr-tools
   Do NOT allowlist @noble/hashes (crashes JS task runner) or faker/@noble/secp256k1.
3. Create GitHub credential with contents:write on the AAE repo; select it on GitHub HTTP nodes.
4. Set Config node githubRepo (default neberg21/aae).
5. Replace REPLACE_ME_HELGA_PREDICTION_URL in Call Helga Flowise with the Flowise Helga prediction URL (https://flowise.neberg.de/...).
6. Activate workflow; copy Production webhook URL.
7. Never commit nsec. Secrets live in workflow static data only.

Spec: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-21-helga-create-identity-n8n-design.md
Relay: wss://nostr.neberg.de
Webhook path: helga-create-identity
